label: Heap
description: Connect to Heap to query product analytics data, track events, and analyze user behavior captured automatically.

form.title: Connect Heap
form.subtitle: Paste your Heap App ID and server-side API key to start querying product analytics data.

methods.label: App ID + API Key
methods.description: Paste your Heap App ID and server-side API key. No OAuth flow required — copy both values from your Heap account settings and you're done.
methods.how_to:
## Find your Heap App ID and API Key

### App ID

1. Log in to [Heap](https://heapanalytics.com) and open your project.
2. Go to **Account → Manage → Projects** (or click your project name in the top nav).
3. Your **App ID** is shown on the project settings page — it's a numeric string (e.g. `1234567890`).

### Server-Side API Key

1. In the same project, navigate to **Account → Manage → API Keys** (or **Settings → API Keys** depending on your Heap version).
2. Click **Generate API Key** if one doesn't exist yet.
3. Copy the key — it is shown in full here and can be viewed again later from this panel.

### Notes

- The App ID identifies your Heap project; the API key authenticates server-side requests.
- If you have multiple Heap environments (e.g. development vs production), make sure you copy the App ID and key from the correct project.
- You can revoke and regenerate keys at any time from the API Keys panel without affecting your tracked data.

fields.name: app_id
fields.label: App ID
fields.description: Found in Account → Manage → Projects. Numeric string that identifies your Heap project.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Server-side API key from Account → Manage → API Keys. Used to authenticate all requests.
